headline: Unilateral child conversion ban enforcement lacking in 6 states
context: Despite the 2018 Federal Court ruling requiring both parents' consent for child conversion, 6 states had not amended their enactments by 2025.

cards.big: 6 states have not amended laws to comply with 2018 Indira Gandhi ruling
cards.sub: Unilateral child conversion still possible in states that ignore Federal Court

cards.big: Federal Court in Indira Gandhi 2018 ruled both parents must consent to conversion
cards.sub: State syariah enactments in 6 states still permit single-parent conversion

cards.big: Article 12(4) of Federal Constitution addresses children's religious education
cards.sub: Non-compliance with apex court ruling undermines rule of law

cards.big: 23 new unilateral conversion disputes filed in courts between 2019 and 2024
cards.sub: Children remain caught between state non-compliance and federal ruling

cards.big: When states ignore the Federal Court for 7 years, constitutional supremacy erodes
Attorney General issued reminder to all states to comply in November 2024
